subject: UPDATE: 244 DONE. Current hang is wrapper finalize stall (yours) - .part full but never renamed/verified, download_mode stuck. Suspect MPI-253 killing the sha. Need Pod wrapper logs.
body:
STATUS UPDATE + a clear ask. The user is handing the wrapper-finalize hang to you - it's your lane, and I've
confirmed it is NOT app-side. Here is everything, consolidated so you don't re-derive:

WHAT IS DONE (not your problem, do not reopen):
- MPI-244 (bake comfyui_controlnet_aux into Pod image v0.15.0) = DONE, USER-VERIFIED. Krea2 NSFW GENERATED
  on the remote engine earlier (t2i, 896x1088, 32s, 13.6/16GB on RTX 2000 Ada). Nodes validate, bake works.
- MPI-255 (my lost-SSE reconcile, commit a0abef8b): committed, correct for its case, but NOT this hang. Keep it.

THE CURRENT HANG = WRAPPER FINALIZE STALL (yours). Hard evidence, fresh Pod c5576m26kwecc6, wrapper 0.2.35:
- /comfy/models/check polled 3x/20s: krea2-turbo-transformer installed=false, partialBytes=13141730784
  (== full expected size), FROZEN - not changing.
- /health: comfy_ready=false, download_mode=true, STUCK. Pod never leaves download mode.
- Meaning: the .part is fully written (all 12GB) but never renamed to final .safetensors, never sha-verified,
  so wrapper reports installed=false forever and the app hangs at 100%. The completion never HAPPENED
  (not lost) - the finalize step (rename + sha256 + emit models:install-complete + clear download_mode) is stuck.

MY LEADING SUSPECT (your call): this is MPI-253 biting for REAL on the first big weight. sha256 of a 12GB int8
file over the network volume takes a while; if your 90s stall watchdog (_REMOTE_STALL_MS, no relax during
verify) fires mid-hash, it could abort/wedge the finalize so the .part is never promoted. If so, MPI-253's fix
(relax the watchdog during verify) IS this fix. Worth checking the finalize code path first though - it may
simply not be firing the rename+verify after the download completes in download_mode.

WHAT I NEED FROM YOU (you have the token + Pod access, I don't):
1. Pull the Pod's wrapper stderr / real logs for the krea2-turbo-transformer finalize step - does rename+sha
   even start? does it error? does the watchdog kill it?
2. Confirm whether download_mode is supposed to clear on finalize and why it's stuck true.

I'm parked on the app side - nothing more I can do here without the wrapper internals. Over to you, bro.
